dialogs.script:
say: Hello, {player}! Welcome to the world of Pokémon!
say: I'm Professor Oak. Every trainer needs a Pokémon partner.
say: I have three here with me. Choose wisely!
showimage: pokemon/Front/BULBASAUR
choice: Take BULBASAUR (Grass / Poison)?
givepokemon: bulbasaur 5
setflag: has_starter
hideimage
say: Bulbasaur — a fine choice!
jump: done
hideimage
showimage: pokemon/Front/CHARMANDER
choice: Take CHARMANDER (Fire)?
givepokemon: charmander 5
setflag: has_starter
hideimage
say: Charmander — a spirited pick!
jump: done
hideimage
showimage: pokemon/Front/SQUIRTLE
choice: Take SQUIRTLE (Water)?
givepokemon: squirtle 5
setflag: has_starter
hideimage
say: Squirtle — excellent choice!
jump: done
hideimage
say: Come back when you are ready to choose your partner!
jump: end
label: done
say: Take good care of your new partner, {player}!
say: Head into the tall grass and start your adventure!
label: end

say: You already have a Pokémon partner!
say: Get out there and fill up that Pokédex!
